articles.title: U.S. House Democrat, who may soon run key committee, condemns crypto in 401(k)s
articles.description: Maxine Waters, the ranking Democrat on House Financial Services, asked the chief of the Department of Labor to withdraw its proposal on alternative assets.

articles.title: Spain regulator rules out extension for non-MiCA compliant crypto companies
articles.description: Carlos San Basilio said that “there will be no exceptions ​or extensions” to the MiCA deadline requiring crypto exchanges offering services to EU-based users to be licensed.

articles.title: Former Ethereum Foundation leader warns of funding gap as governance shifts
articles.description: A former Ethereum Foundation member says the network must quickly build new funding institutions as the Foundation steps back.

articles.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
articles.description: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”

articles.title: Anti-trafficking group says Clarity Act's Section 604 could weaken accountability
articles.description: An anti-human trafficking advocate said a Clarity Act provision could weaken accountability despite existing criminal laws.

articles.title: OpenAI poaches Uber India chief to lead its biggest market outside the US
articles.description: The hire marks OpenAI's latest push into India, expanding offices, partnerships and hiring.

articles.title: Virtuals' Jansen Teng says AI agents are evolving into autonomous economic actors
articles.description: The next phase of AI agents may be less about chat and more about earning, spending and coordinating.

articles.title: SEC, CFTC seek input on unified portfolio margin rules across securities and derivatives
articles.description: The regulatory agencies are seeking public feedback on cross-margining, collateral and risk management as cryptocurrency derivatives and multi-asset trading continue to expand.

articles.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
articles.description: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building

articles.title: Ethereum whale who shorted October 2025 crash opens $19.7M ETH short position
articles.description: Ether’s technical setup points to a potential drop to $1,375, a move that could lift one whale’s unrealized profit to $2.39 million.

articles.title: Tesla settles FSD crash lawsuit as federal investigations continue
articles.description: The lawsuit was connected to a fatal 2023 crash involving a vehicle using the company's advanced driver assistance system known as Full Self-Driving.

articles.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
articles.description: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

articles.title: Crypto Biz: The cost of stacking sats
articles.description: CryptoQuant urged Strategy to pause Bitcoin buying as dividend coverage shrank. Meanwhile, CBOE eyes crypto perpetual futures and Chainlink joins a stablecoin FX project.

articles.title: US senators push to end CFTC ‘assault’ on state oversight of prediction markets
articles.description: A group of 17 Democratic senators went after the CFTC’s funding for lawsuits over prediction markets, calling it an “assault” on state authorities.

articles.title: Bitcoin makes first sub-$60K close since Q3 2024 as tech stocks enter ‘deep bear market’
articles.description: Bitcoin risked turning $60,000 into resistance as BTC price weakness persisted following another tech-driven sell-off in Asian stock markets.

articles.title: Securitize expects to raise $400 million as tokenization firm nears public debut
articles.description: The BlackRock-backed tokenization specialist expects to close its SPAC merger next week and start trading on the NYSE, pending shareholder approval.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
